title: ReViV: Reconstructing the Viewer and the View in 4D from Monocular Egocentric Video
innovation_summary: ReViV: Reconstructing the Viewer and the View in 4D from Monocular Egocentric Video: To address these limitations, we present ReViV, the first unified framework for holistic egocentric 4D reconstruction that extracts both viewer and view dynamics from a single.
